//: MCP servers passed to the brain via `claude -p --mcp-config`. The `google` server runs locally via npx (no Docker) and gives the brain Gmail + Calendar tools (mcp__google__*). It needs your own Google OAuth Desktop client — set GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID / GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET in .env, then authorize once (see README §Gmail/Calendar). ${VAR} is expanded from your environment (.env is loaded before the brain runs). To disable Mail/Calendar, set mcpServers to {}.
